allow: PowerShell(foreach \($f in 'questions_history.json','questions_art.json'\) { $p = "app\\src\\main\\assets\\$f"; try { $j = Get-Content $p -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $byDiff = $j | Group-Object difficulty | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Name\)=$\($_.Count\)" }; $ids = \($j.id | Sort-Object -Unique\).Count; "$f : OK, total=$\($j.Count\), uniqueIds=$ids, [$\($byDiff -join ', '\)]" } catch { "$f : PARSE ERROR -> $_" } })
